ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signal_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "power_tl_max" REAL /* Maximum power level for transmit (TL) */,
  "power_tl_min" REAL /* Minimum power level for transmit (TL) */,
  "power_rl_max" REAL /* Maximum power level for receive (RL) */,
  "power_rl_min" REAL /* Minimum power level for receive (RL) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network component */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_measurements_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES network_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., primary, backup) */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES signal_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Power TL, Power RL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., dBm, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type this threshold applies to */,
  "max_limit" REAL /* Maximum limit for the measurement */,
  "min_limit" REAL /* Minimum limit for the measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site this threshold applies to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network component this threshold applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_thresholds_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_thresholds_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES network_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_thresholds_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement taken */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES signal_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of performance metrics */,
  "detailed_report" TEXT /* Detailed report in text format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the network component */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site the component belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., transmitter, receiver) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_components_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts_logs" (
  "alert_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert logged */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the alert was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the alert resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_projects_project_lead FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES collaboration_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_meetings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES collaboration_projects ("project_id")
)
